allow: PowerShell($urls = @\("/", "/gift/test", "/create/test", "/g/abc123", "/dashboard", "/pricing", "/privacy", "/terms"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3099$url" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "$url -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \(len=$\($r.Content.Length\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "$url -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3099" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match "HoneyHearts"\) { "Brand: HoneyHearts found" } else { "WARNING: HoneyHearts NOT found" }; if \($r.Content -match "DearlyMade"\) { "WARNING: DearlyMade still present" } else { "DearlyMade removed - good" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3099" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match "HoneyHearts"\) { "HoneyHearts found" } else { "HoneyHearts NOT found" }; if \($r.Content -match "DearlyMade"\) { "DearlyMade still present" } else { "DearlyMade gone" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/g/test01" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "next" } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "Stopped")

PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({tailwindcss: p.devDependencies?.tailwindcss || p.dependencies?.tailwindcss, postcss: p.devDependencies?.postcss || p.dependencies?.postcss, autoprefixer: p.devDependencies?.autoprefixer || p.dependencies?.autoprefixer}, null, 2\)\)")
